mapper.select: select IS_ALLOWED from MEMBER M left join MEMBER_ROLE MR on M.MEMBER_NO = MR.MEMBER_NO left join ROLE_INFO R on MR.ROLE_NO = R.ROLE_NO left join ROLE_RESOURCE RR on R.ROLE_NO = RR.ROLE_NO left join URL_RESOURCE UR on RR.RESOURCE_NO = UR.RESOURCE_NO where M.MEMBER_NO = #{userNO} and #{url} LIKE UR.URL_PATTERN || '%'
